headline: Agoda Reveals Malaysians Rank Fourth Among Top Foodie Travelers in Asia
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda has unveiled its ranking of Asian travelers that are the most passionate about culinary experiences during their travels. The findings, derived from a survey of Asian travelers as part of Agoda's 2026 Travel Outlook Report, reveal that Malaysians travelers rank fourth among the top foodie travelers in Asia, with one in three Malaysians citing the discovery of new culinary experiences as a primary reason for travel.
